_comment: Snowflake MCP server (snowflake-labs-mcp), local stdio. Read-only is enforced by the SQL statement allowlist in config/snowflake-mcp-tools.yaml (SELECT/DESCRIBE/SHOW/USE only) — pinned via --service-config-file. Uses your `default` Snowflake connection (~/.snowflake/config.toml); no secret in committed config. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
